constructor.details: Initialize with identity and reputation registry addresses If either address is zero, a mock registry will be deployed

params._identityRegistry: Address of ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry (or zero to deploy mock)
params._reputationRegistry: Address of ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry (or zero to deploy mock)

getAgentInfoFromERC8004(address).details: Get agent registration info from ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry

getRegistrationId(address).details: Get registration ID for an agent

getReputationFromERC8004(address).details: Get reputation data from ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry

isAgentRegisteredOnERC8004(address).details: Check if an agent is registered on ERC-8004

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

postFeedbackToERC8004(address,uint8,stri.details: Post feedback to the ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry

params.agent: Address of the agent being rated

registerAgentOnERC8004(string,string,str.details: Register an agent on the ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry

returns.registrationId: The registration ID from the registry

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setIdentityRegistry(address).details: Update the identity registry address (owner only)

params.newRegistry: Address of the new identity registry

setReputationRegistry(address).details: Update the reputation registry address (owner only)

params.newRegistry: Address of the new reputation registry

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.
